title: onosma pilosa
intro: Onosma pilosa, also known as downy onosma or smooth onosma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. Onosma pilosa is rich in alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against infections. The herbal preparations of Onosma pilosa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems.
